zh.lifeSummary: Botho von Schwarzenberg於大約1070年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇庫爾斯騰圖姆 薩辛阿赤 史維尼次史瓦波格。他和Petrissa von Schwarzenberg至少有1個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: Botho
meanings: Some translate Otho 'happy' and Otto 'rich;' but they would seem to be the same name, for Otho of Freysingen, son of Leopold, Margrave of Austria, and of Agnes, daughter of the Emperor Henry IV., is also called Otto. It was the surname of a Roman emperor, and of one of the Roscian family; It comes from Old German od, excelling, happy, fortunate.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: Botho von Schwarzenberg was born about 1070, in Schwarzenburg, Amt Schweinitz, Saxony, Holy Roman Empire. He had at least 1 daughter with Petrissa von Schwarzenberg.

ko.lifeSummary: Botho von Schwarzenberg(은)는 대략 1070년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 커프u르스투 작센 아트 슈위니츠 슈워즌버그에서 태어났다. 그는 Petrissa von Schwarzenberg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.
